summary: Frontend/static-site testing of 4 SEO fixes (orphan pages, engineer unification, sitemap noindex removal, title<=60 & one H1). All 4 fixes verified working; found ONE critical bug (main-search partial aliases dead) → applied a 1-line export fix (added resolvePartial/resolvePartialRule to window.smartFallback in smart-fallback.js:1414) and re-verified.

integration_issues.flow: Main-search partial aliases (زهور→منسق زهور, هاتفي→بائع هاتفي, ورد→منسق ورد, مياه→فني مياه)
integration_issues.issue: BEFORE FIX: professions.js:401 called window.smartFallback.resolvePartial() which was undefined because smart-fallback.js:1414 exposed only { matchTemplate, TEMPLATES, RULES }. Partial hook silently skipped → classifyProfession returned a generic 'أخرى' card. FIXED by adding resolvePartial and resolvePartialRule to the window.smartFallback export. After fix: زهور → title 'منسق زهور' cat 'مسار البائع / منسق الزهور', 9 reqs incl. 'إحضار شهادة الصف العاشر'; هاتفي → title 'بائع هاتفي'.

action_items: Please review my 1-line fix at smart-fallback.js:1414 (added resolvePartial/resolvePartialRule to window.smartFallback export) — this was the root cause of main-search partial-alias failure.
critical_code_review_comments: smart-fallback.js:1414 export was incomplete (only matchTemplate/TEMPLATES/RULES) — silently broke professions.js:401 partial-match branch with no console error. Add a defensive console.warn or a unit-test asserting window.smartFallback.resolvePartial exists on load.
professions.js file is ~709 lines and smart-fallback.js is ~1416 lines — both exceed the 700-line guideline; consider splitting smart-fallback.js into rules.js / templates.js / resolver.js modules.
professions.js:401 checks typeof resolvePartial==='function' but silently no-ops when missing — better to log a warning so this class of regression is caught early.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Site is static; all critical requirements from the request pass after fixing the resolvePartial export. If further changes are made to smart-fallback.js, re-run partial-search checks for زهور/هاتفي/ورد/مياه and engineer unification for the 4 مهندس variants. Note: SW caches aggressively — always append ?v=<n> or unregister SW before reload.
rca_of_the_issue: professions.js line 401 guarded on `window.smartFallback && typeof window.smartFallback.resolvePartial === 'function'`. Because smart-fallback.js line 1414 exposed only { matchTemplate, TEMPLATES, RULES }, resolvePartial was undefined, the guard evaluated false, and the code silently fell through to classifyProfession which returned a generic 'أخرى' fallback card. Fix: extend the export to include resolvePartial and resolvePartialRule.
